chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett. No.D-1688 of 2025 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No. 6610/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objections at flag ‘A’ 3. For order son CMA No.611/2025 (Ex/A) 4. For orders on CMA No.6612/2025 (S/A) 5. For hearing of main case 01.10.2025 Mr. Asif Ali Jatoi, Advocate for petitioner ************** 1. Granted. 2. Deferred for the time being. 3. Granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 4&5. The petitioner, through the present petition, seeks quashment of FIR bearing Crime No. 1228 of 2025, registered at Police Station Roheelanwali, District Muzaffargarh, for the offence punishable under Section 496-A, PPC. Since the alleged incident as well as the registration of the FIR does not fall within the territorial jurisdiction of this Court, this Court is not inclined to interfere in the matter merely on the ground that one of the accused is a resident of territorial jurisdiction of this Court. Accordingly, this petition, being not maintainable before this Court, is dismissed in limine. However, the petitioner(s) are at liberty to avail appropriate remedy before the competent Court of law having jurisdiction, in accordance with law, for the relief claimed through the present petition. J U D G E J U D G E M. Ali*
